text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: As I'm passing through the school<n>gates...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
It's the head of the disciplinary<n>committee,
Bamboo Memory! I<n>wonder if she's doing
rounds?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
She almost looks... sinister. I bet<n>she's a real
stickler when it comes to<n>school rule violations
and stuff...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, greetings! You're one of the<n>school
trainers, right?
choice_data_list: Hey. Are you out here doing rounds?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Nope! Recently, there've been reports<n>of a
suspicious woman in a white coat<n>and mask
running around campus, so<n>I'm on the lookout!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
No prob! Just doing my duty as a<n>member of the
disciplinary committee!

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Member
text_block_list.text: Urgent news, Bamboo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: What is it?!

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Member
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship started practicing a giant<n>swing
wrestling move in the central<n>plaza all of a
sudden...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That Golshi! She's always causing a<n>ruckus!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, it'll be trouble if she makes<n>herself dizzy,
falls over, and hurts<n>herself...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I shall stop her at once!
choice_data_list: You've got your work cut out for you, huh?
You've got your work cut out for you, huh?
You'd better hurry to the scene of the crime!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I shall stop her at once!
choice_data_list: You've got your work cut out for you, huh?
You've got your work cut out for you, huh?
You'd better hurry to the scene of the crime!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: No worries! This is nothing, really!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, it's a good thing when<n>people start
causing trouble because it<n>means they're in
good spirits!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I just need to keep an eye out and<n>make sure
they don't do anything<n>totally off the charts. Rest<n>
assured—I've got this.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well, some trouble still catches me off<n>guard, but
it also adds some zest into<n>my life. Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory has a big smile on<n>her face as
she runs off.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Roger that! If I make a straight dash<n>toward the
plaza, I'll get there in no<n>time!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If it's not too much trouble, could you<n>watch over
this area for me?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Whoa, thanks! I owe you big time!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right, time to earn my keep as the<n>
no-nonsense leader of the<n>disciplinary committee
and get things<n>under control!

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Member
text_block_list.text: Bamboo! Wait for me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory sprints off, leaving<n>the other
committee member<n>frantically chasing after her.
